channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: New AP-NORC poll reveals sharp divides among US Jews over Israel and Gaza
item.description: A new AP-NORC poll highlights divisions among American Jews regarding Israel. The survey shows that religiously affiliated Jews often see support for Israel as central to their identity, while those who are religiously unaffiliated are more critical of Israel’s actions in Gaza.

item.title: Federal immigration agent fatally shoots man in Houston during an enforcement operation
Manhattan high-rise deemed stable after columns buckled, and some evacuations are lifted
